name: Time taken to open book
steps: 1. From home screen, navigate to your library\n2. Select any book from your library\n3. Start timing when you tap the book, stop when the book fully opens and content is visible

name: Time taken to turn a page
steps: 1. Open a book\n2. Locate a page with text\n3. Start timing when you tap/swipe to turn page, stop when the new page is fully rendered

name: Time taken to exit a book
steps: 1. From within a book, tap the top of the screen to show the menu\n2. Tap the back arrow to exit to the library

name: Time to load library
steps: 1. From the home screen, tap the 'Library' tab\n2. Time until all book covers are loaded

name: Book download time
steps: 1. Find a book that is not downloaded\n2. Tap to download\n3. Time until the book is fully downloaded and ready to open

name: Device boot time
steps: 1. Power off the device completely\n2. Press the power button to turn it on\n3. Time until the home screen is fully loaded and responsive

name: WiFi connection time
steps: 1. Turn off WiFi\n2. Turn on WiFi\n3. Time until the device connects to a known network
